expectations.text: Filename follows SwiftBar convention with refresh interval
Script calls the Hacker News API
Script includes error handling for API failures
expectations.evidence: Lines 22-27: try/except in fetch_json, and lines 60-63: if not stories fallback

expectations.text: News items include href= parameter for opening in browser
expectations.evidence: Line 75: href={url} on each story line
Lines 3-8: Uses bitbar.* tags (bitbar.title, bitbar.version, etc.) instead of the current xbar.* convention. While SwiftBar accepts both, the modern standard is xbar.*
